title: Mildly Spiced Kenyan Garlic Bulb Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy Kenyan dish featuring garlic bulb, perfect for a post-workout snack, with a floral and glassy-jelly texture from the garlic and a low-fat friendly cooking method. This dish is easy to make and can be served as a side or a light meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the vegetable oil, lemon juice, ginger paste, cumin powder, coriander powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the garlic cloves to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated garlic cloves onto skewers, leaving a small space between each clove.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the garlic bulb skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of low-fat yogurt or a green salad for a healthy and filling snack.
